response.justification: Candidate brings deep full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB work at re:cinq and Optilyz, plus hands-on AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators — a strong match for the AI agent development requirement. Polyglot background (Java, D, C/C++, Python-adjacent) supports the secondary Kotlin/Java need, and the craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) aligns with the code quality and architecture responsibilities. Some resume inconsistencies in dates and a lack of explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, or major cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure) mentions warrant clarification in interview.
strengths: Direct TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB full-stack experience plus AI agent and MCP tooling work
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, testing frameworks, and teaching/workshops
Polyglot engineer (TS, Java, D, C/C++, Swift) able to cover secondary Kotlin/Java needs
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, or Playwright in the listed stacks
Cloud platform exposure limited to AWS CDK reference; no Kubernetes/GCP/Azure depth shown beyond GISCollective deployment
Resume timeline has overlapping and implausible date ranges (e.g., employment starting in 1992 at age implied by 1995 BSc) that need clarification
